---
title: "Part 8: Lineage and Practical Migration Notes"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

[Back to regularizeNd series home](index.qmd)

[Previous: Part 7](part-07-iterative-solvers-and-memory-strategy.qmd)

This part documents historical lineage and practical migration guidance.

## Practical Goal

- Clarify conceptual lineage from prior tools to regularizeNd.
- Show how to compare behavior using included historical examples.
- Provide migration tips for users coming from older workflows.

## Example Anchors

- `regularizeNd/Examples/From gridfit/`
- `regularizeNd/Examples/From RegularizeData3D/`

## Scope and Wording

- This article frames regularizeNd as inspired by earlier work.
- It avoids derivative-code claims unless explicit evidence supports that statement.

## Attribution

This educational progression is inspired by Peter Goldstein's regularization articles and related prior tools.

## Next

[Deep-Dive: Regularizer Design and Derivative Order](deep-dive-regularizer-design-and-derivative-order.qmd)
